title: Dental Patients with Bad Breath: 7 Herbal Teas to Help
description: Mentha x piperita teas, also known as peppermint tea, can help with bad breath by reducing the bacteria that cause it. This is due to its antibacterial properties, which come from compounds like menthol and menthone. These compounds kill the bacteria that cause bad breath by disrupting their cell membranes, making it harder for them to survive.
